arts.ttl: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool: How Arne Slot is already planning for Premier League title defence
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on Brighton & Hove Albion on Monday night, but Arne Slot is showing that he is already planning for next season.
